title: Sky Drift
style_notes: Open sky feel — bright azure background with floating clouds and drifting particles. Light, airy, no gravity. Simple but evocative of being outdoors, looking up. Clouds and particles coexist without interaction, each living in their own layer.
mood: light, airy, daydream, weightless, open space
palette: azure sky (#42aaf5), white clouds, light particles
motion: horizontal drift, slow float, gentle wandering
